about.label: ABOUT ME
about.heading: Professional Recruitment Consulting
about.text1: My name is Eric Ewle and my passion is bringing companies and IT professionals together successfully. Through my extensive experience in direct placement of IT specialists, I know what it takes to fill IT positions successfully.
about.text2: I help companies find specialized IT talent and guide IT experts in finding the right job.
about.mission: To help both companies and IT experts achieve their goals and enable successful collaboration.

items.title: Recruitment
items.description: I provide recruitment services tailored specifically to your company's needs, ensuring that IT professionals are not only technically qualified but also a great cultural fit for your team.

items.title: Active Sourcing
items.description: Through targeted active sourcing and my existing network, I proactively identify and recruit highly qualified talent who may not be actively looking for a job. This gives you access to the best available professionals in the market.

items.title: Process Optimization
items.description: I advise you on improving your recruiting strategies and processes so you can find and retain the right IT professionals more efficiently in the long run.

region.label: REGION
region.heading: Focus on Upper Austria
region.text: Based in Vienna with a focus on Upper Austria, I am building a strong regional network to sustainably connect companies and IT talent in the region.

partners.label: PARTNERS
partners.heading: Companies that trust me
partners.text: I work closely with selected companies to find the best IT professionals for their teams.

contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.subtext: Tell me briefly about your staffing needs. I will get back to you.
contact.benefit1_text: No obligation whatsoever. I listen first.
contact.benefit2_text: I handle your data confidentially and in compliance with applicable law.

form.need_placeholder: e.g. Software Development, IT Infrastructure, Data Engineering
form.message_placeholder: Briefly describe the positions you are looking to fill.
form.gdpr: I agree to the processing of my data in accordance with the privacy policy.
form.success: Thank you! I will be in touch shortly.
form.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

legal.placeholder: This is a placeholder document for demo purposes. The legally binding content will be finalized before this website goes live.

cookie.text: This website uses cookies to provide you with the best possible experience.
cookie.necessary_text: These cookies are required for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
cookie.stats_text: These cookies help us understand how visitors use the website.
